$comment: Hand-maintained inventory of third-party components that are NOT npm dependencies (native binaries, runtime downloads, embedded runtimes). Merged into the in-app Open-Source Licenses screen by scripts/generate-oss-licenses.mjs. Keep this honest: every bundled or runtime-downloaded third-party component belongs here.

components.name: Electron
components.notes: Desktop application shell. Bundles Chromium (BSD-style licenses) and Node.js (MIT); their full third-party notices ship inside the Electron distribution (LICENSES.chromium.html).

components.name: realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan
components.notes: Local AI upscaler engine. Downloaded on demand by the one-click 'Install & start local upscaler' flow; not bundled in the installer.

components.name: ncnn
components.notes: Tencent's neural-network inference framework, statically embedded in the realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan binary.

components.name: Real-ESRGAN models (realesrgan-x4plus, realesrgan-x4plus-anime)
components.notes: Upscaling model weights downloaded with the desktop local upscaler.

components.name: Local Dream native runtime (libstable_diffusion_core.so + QNN startup path)
components.notes: On-device NPU upscaler backend by xororz, extracted unmodified from the Local Dream release APK. Attribution-NonCommercial license — commercial-distribution compatibility is under review (docs/notes/803).

components.name: Qualcomm QNN / Hexagon HTP runtime libraries
components.notes: Accelerator runtime libraries redistributed via the Local Dream APK. Redistribution terms under review (docs/notes/803).

components.name: On-device upscaler models (4x-UltraSharpV2-Lite by Kim2091; realesrgan-x4plus-anime-6b)
components.license: Kim2091 model: upstream license unverified; realesrgan-x4plus-anime-6b: BSD-3-Clause
components.notes: Downloaded on demand for on-device Android upscaling; per-chipset compiled variants hosted by the Local Dream author.

components.name: FFmpeg (ffmpeg.wasm core, @ffmpeg/core)
components.notes: WebAssembly FFmpeg core fetched at runtime from jsDelivr for video composition; not bundled with the app.
